meaning: n.杀子女者,杀子女的行为
examples: Spousal revenge "is the most rare form of filicide, the murder of a child by a parent.
Spouse revenge filicide: occurs when a mother kills her child to emotionally harm that child's father.
Altruistic filicide: a mother kills her child out of love; she believes death to be in the child's best interest (includes maternal filicide-suicide cases).
